query:
SELECT 
  p.id as positionId,
  p.name as positionName,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as categoryCount,
  COUNT(pq.id) as questionCount
FROM positions p
LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId
LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId
WHERE p.id IN (5, 6, 8)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
ORDER BY p.id;

  p.id as positionId,
  p.name as positionName,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as categoryCount,
  COUNT(pq.id) as questionCount
FROM positions p
LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId
LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId
WHERE p.id IN (5, 6, 8)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
ORDER BY p.id;
